## Rent a car in Sydenhamwith Arnold Clark Car & Van Rental

Looking to rent a car in London? We’re excited to be expanding our branch network in the south of England with the opening of our brand-new location in Sydenham on Mayow Road. Whether you’re taking a day trip into the centre of London or need to hire a car for just a few hours, we’ve got you covered with a brilliant array of vehicles to choose from.

## Arnold Clark car hirein Sydenham

You may recognise our address as an Arnold Clark branch already – and you’d be correct! We recently took over the Arnold Clark Electric Car Centre previously based in this location, so you can find us just off the main road in the middle of Sydenham.

We are based in a beautiful, lively area of London. Sydenham features many simple yet peaceful attractions, such as parks and walking trails, for you to enjoy. Along Sydenham Road, you will find classic pubs that are full of life and picturesque cafés to relax in.

What you need to know

## Driving your hire car in Sydenham

### Congestion zones and ULEZ

London consists of multiple congestion zones and an Ultra Low Emission Zone (ULEZ). Sydenham is no exception to these rules – so, if you are looking to rent a car from us, we just want to make you aware of this.

Congestion zones are common throughout London, and while we aren’t based in one of the zones, we suggest you plan your trip ahead to work out whether you may be affected by these zones to ensure no surprise charges occur during your trip.

However, we are based inside the ULEZ zone. This shouldn’t be an issue unless you are using your own vehicle to get to our branch. If this is the case, you may need to consider whether your vehicle meets the low emission standards. You can check this by using the [Transport for London](https://tfl.gov.uk/modes/driving/ultra-low-emission-zone?intcmp=26434) website to determine if your vehicle is considered ‘low emission’.

### Things to do in and around Sydenham

Sydenham has plenty to offer through the many parks and lovely nature walks it offers. It’s also close enough to London city centre if you plan to take a day trip there. Here are some of the things to do in and around Sydenham.

**London Zoo**![](https://www.arnoldclarkrental.com/assets/images/shared/icons/icon--chevron-right-circled.svg)

**Sydenham Hill Wood and Cox’s Walk**![](https://www.arnoldclarkrental.com/assets/images/shared/icons/icon--chevron-right-circled.svg)

**Hyde Park**![](https://www.arnoldclarkrental.com/assets/images/shared/icons/icon--chevron-right-circled.svg)

## Arnold Clark Car & Van Rental Services

- ![](https://www.arnoldclarkrental.com/assets/images/shared/icons/icon--arrow.svg)

#### One-way  car rental



We offer one-way car rental to and from any of our branches across the UK. We understand that you might just need a vehicle to get you from A to B, so it may be more convenient for you drop off your rental car at a different branch from the one you picked it up at. We have plenty of branches across the UK for you to return the car to. Use our one-way hire page to find out the nearest drop-off location to you. A charge of £50 will be added to your costs to cover this service.





[One-way hire](https://www.arnoldclarkrental.com/one-way-rental)

- ![](https://www.arnoldclarkrental.com/assets/images/shared/icons/icon--refresh.svg)

#### Wide range  of vehicles



We know that everyone has different plans when going to London; that’s why we are proud to offer you an extensive collection of vehicles to choose from. We provide everything from small cars to larger cars like SUVs, which means we are confident you will find the perfect vehicle that meets your requirements for the extent of your trip.





[Browse rental cars](https://www.arnoldclarkrental.com/rental/web/xcr3/xcrv/xcrvvehicles.p)

- ![](https://www.arnoldclarkrental.com/assets/images/shared/icons/icon--shield.svg)

#### Sydenham car hire insurance



When you hire a car from us, we include the cost of insurance, so you don’t have to worry it. We disclose an insurance excess of £1,500 at the time of booking, which is to be paid if the vehicle is damaged during your rental. This cost can be reduced however, when you take out the collision damage waiver on your booking.





[Tell me more](https://www.arnoldclarkrental.com/insurance)


### Why choose Arnold Clark   Car & Van Rental Sydenham car hire?

#### Excellent customer service

![](https://www.arnoldclarkrental.com/assets/images/shared/icons/icon--star.svg)

At Arnold Clark we are committed to providing the highest level of customer satisfaction through the services we provide. A customer's experience while hiring from us is extremely important and we pride ourselves in having a **4.9/5 ‘Excellent’** rating on Trustpilot.

#### Vehicles guaranteed when booked

![](https://www.arnoldclarkrental.com/assets/images/shared/icons/icon--tick-container.svg)

When you book a car with us, we guarantee to assign a vehicle to your booking. No one should have to start their journey stressed when there isn’t a vehicle ready to go for them.

#### Competitive rates

![](https://www.arnoldclarkrental.com/assets/images/shared/icons/icon--scales.svg)

With over 60 years of experience in the rental industry we are delighted to offer competitive prices with a flexible range of vehicle hire options.

#### No hidden fees

![](https://www.arnoldclarkrental.com/assets/images/shared/icons/icon--wallet.svg)

We want your journey with us to be hassle free. The price you are quoted includes insurance, VAT and roadside assistance. Additional extras can be found during the booking process so there are no surprises when you turn up to collect your hire vehicle.

FAQs

## Sydenham car hire FAQs

What documents do I need to hire a car in Sydenham?

You will need a full UK driving licence, a bill such as a bank statement for proof of address and your DVLA check code to make the process easy.

EU residents that don’t live within the UK will need a copy of their domestic licence in English and photographic ID of either a passport or ID card.

Are there any hidden costs when hiring from Sydenham?

There are no hidden costs when hiring from Sydenham. We make sure to keep our costing completely transparent from the start, including fees for exceeding limited mileage etc. Get in touch with us if you have any queries.

How far can I drive a car hired from Sydenham?

You can drive anywhere in the UK in one of our rental cars. The vehicle can also be taken to Northern Ireland or the Republic of Ireland with prior discussion and arrangement with our branch.

There is a 250-mile limit included when you hire from us for four days or less. If you are hiring for four days or more, we provide unlimited mileage for your convenience.
